messages.content: We introduce Intern-S1-Pro, a trillion-scale MoE multimodal scientific reasoning model. The model delivers top-tier performance on advanced reasoning benchmarks and achieves leading results across key AI4Science domains (chemistry, materials, life-science, earth, etc.), while maintaining strong general multimodal and text capabilities.  在上文的基础上，增加一下模型介绍吧，1T总参，512专家，8个激活专家，22B激活参数

We introduce **Intern-S1-Pro**, a trillion-scale MoE multimodal scientific reasoning model. **Intern-S1-Pro scales to 1T total parameters with 512 experts, activating 8 experts per token (22B activated parameters)**, enabling high-capacity scientific reasoning with efficient inference. The model delivers top-tier performance on advanced reasoning benchmarks and achieves leading results across key AI4Science domains (chemistry, materials, life science, earth science, etc.), while maintaining strong general multimodal and text capabilities.
